product_highlights: Peptide-based hair growth and anti-hair loss actives with clinical validation
CAPIXYL™ distributor — biomimetic peptide complex for hair growth support
Hair strengthening peptides targeting cortex repair and cuticle reinforcement
Scalp stimulation actives promoting follicle activity and circulation
notes: Lipotec, a division of Lubrizol's personal care business based in Barcelona, Spain, is a world leader in peptide-based cosmetic actives for both skin and hair care. Their hair care peptide portfolio includes anti-hair loss actives, hair fibre-strengthening peptides, and scalp stimulation ingredients, all backed by rigorous clinical and in-vitro testing. As part of the Lubrizol family, Lipotec benefits from global distribution, regulatory expertise, and formulation support, making them a go-to partner for premium, science-backed hair care formulations.
specializations: Biomimetic peptide technology for hair care
product_highlights: Biotinoyl Tripeptide-1 (Procapil® component) — biotinylated peptide stimulating follicle anchoring proteins and hair growth cycle
Acetyl Tetrapeptide-3 — targets ECM proteins around the hair follicle to anchor the hair shaft and stimulate growth
Vividine® — biomimetic peptide for scalp sebum regulation and anti-androgenic activity
Peptide delivery systems optimised for scalp penetration and sustained release
notes: Lipotec, a division of Lubrizol Life Science Beauty headquartered in Barcelona, Spain, is one of the world's foremost peptide ingredient manufacturers for cosmetic applications. Their hair care peptide portfolio includes Biotinoyl Tripeptide-1 — a biotinylated hair growth peptide that strengthens the attachment of the hair bulb to the dermal papilla by stimulating key anchoring proteins — and Acetyl Tetrapeptide-3, which acts on extracellular matrix proteins around the hair follicle to promote hair density and reduce hair loss. Lipotec supplies these actives as both individual INCI ingredients and as formulated actives with full clinical and regulatory dossiers.
